briefs.title: Port Property Tax Designations Updated for 2026 — Two BC Marine Terminals Named
briefs.summary: BC has updated the list of properties that qualify for special port property tax treatment under the Ports Property Tax Act, effective for the 2026 tax year. The new schedule names Alliance Grain Terminal (Agricore) and PKM Canada Marine Terminal Limited Partnership as the designated eligible port properties, replacing the previous 2025 list.
briefs.action_required: Check if your port or marine terminal property is on the 2026 designated list — contact BC Assessment if unsure.

key_dates.label: BC Eligible Port Property Designation — 2026 taxation year takes effect
